daily.today_energy: The moon's got your back today, Cancer. You're feeling introspective but magnetic—people are drawn to your vibe. Channel this into deep conversations and meaningful connections. Rest when you need it.
daily.love: Someone might be picking up on your energy in a major way. Whether single or coupled, authenticity is your superpower rn. Share what's actually on your mind instead of playing it safe.
daily.career: Your intuition about that project or decision is legit. Trust your gut feeling even if it doesn't make logical sense yet. Small progress today compounds into something real.
daily.health: Your nervous system needs some TLC. Try grounding yourself—literally touch grass, journal, or take a bath. Sleep matters more than usual, so don't skimp on rest tonight.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to soften your edges and trust the unfolding. A lunar shift reminds you that vulnerability isn't weakness—it's your superpower. Lean into what feels nourishing.
weekly.love: Someone's paying attention to your energy. Whether single or coupled, this is a moment to articulate what you actually need instead of assuming people should just know. Honesty hits different.
weekly.career: Your intuition about a project or person is spot-on. Don't second-guess yourself into paralysis. A small win mid-week builds momentum. Your effort is being noticed, even if quietly.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Prioritize sleep, hydration, and whatever grounds you—whether that's a walk, journaling, or just sitting with your thoughts. You're processing a lot.
